title: Self-Prioritising GRCS Audit Policy and Execution Schema (Variant v2)
description: Defines scheduling, execution policies, and enforcement actions for continuous control verification with autonomous engine integration.

policyId.description: Unique identifier for the self-prioritising Audit Policy with variant identifier (v2).

autonomousPolicyRules.description: Dynamic scheduling and execution policies with autonomous engine integration, incorporating variant-specific considerations.

controlVerificationInterval.description: Interval in milliseconds for control verification ( referenced by controlId ), with adaptive threshold based on job performance metrics.

contextWindow.description: Number of preceding jobs required for chained context, taking into account variant-specific rules for job data aggregation.

chainedContext.description: Stored context of previous jobs, with variant-specific format and data structure modifications.

variantSpecificData.description: Variant-specific job data, incorporating modifications for v2 variant.

jobData.description: Job-specific data, with potential variant-specific format changes.
